name: Cottage Cheese-Potato Salad for 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: 30 minutes including cooking the potato and chilling.
2. Cook the potato in its jacket until just tender. Allow it to cool until it can be handled, then peel and dice into a bowl. You should have about 1 cup of diced potato.
3. In a separate bowl, stir together the oil, vinegar, and salt. Pour this mixture over the hot potato and toss lightly to combine.
4. Cool the potato mixture for a few minutes.
5. Add the celery, green pepper, pimento, olives, and sliced green onion to the salad. Stir the mayonnaise and cottage cheese together in another bowl, then add this mixture to the salad and toss lightly.
6. Chill the salad well before serving on lettuce.
